Jinx is standing on a rooftop with another character, she is holding the other character's arm, the camera angle is high, showing the rooftops and buildings in the background, the setting appears to be a city with unique architecture, the lighting is bright and sunny, creating shadows on the buildings, the camera is static, capturing the scene from a slightly elevated position, the characters are relatively still, with slight movements as they interact, the other character has pink hair and a backpack.
